MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-07-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SLEEP SCIENCE PARTNERS, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITATION AWARDS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 19, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. PETITIONER TIMELY FILED AND SERVED THE PETITION TO CONFIRM. SEE CCP 1288 AND 1290.2. AT THE REQUEST OF RESPONDENT, THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO GIVE RESPONDENT AN OPPORTUNITY TO RETAIN OR FURTHER CONSULT WITH COUNSEL. A SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION BY RESPONDENT, IF ANY, IS DUE JULY 8, 2013 AND PETITIONER MAY FILE A REPLY TO THAT OPPOSITION BY JULY 12, 2013. COURTESY COPIES OF THESE PAPERS MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE DAY OF FILING. (COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER SLEEP SCIENCE PARTNERS, INC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is off calendar. Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Arb Awars

Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Arb Awars
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Continued To Jul-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: heather flick, esq., 415.765.6685, for petitioner sleep science partners, inc.
steve welker, respondent in pro per.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling re: PETITIONER SLEEP SCIENCE PARTNERS, INC.'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitation Awards. Petitioner timely filed and served the petition to confirm. See CCP 1288 and 1290.2. At the request of respondent, the Court continues the matter to give respondent an opportunity to retain or further consult with counsel. The matter is continued to July 19, 2013. A supplemental opposition by respondent, if any, is due July 8, 2013 and petitioner may file a reply to that opposition by July 12, 2013. Courtesy copies of these papers must be delivered to Department 302 on the day of filing. (counsel for petitioner to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
